stories.title: Employee can submit a leave request
stories.description: Show a form with date range picker and reason field. On submit, create the request and show it in 'Pending' status. Show a confirmation message with the request ID.
acceptance_criteria: Date range picker shows available days (excludes weekends and public holidays)
On submit, request appears in 'Pending' status in the employee's request list
Confirmation message shows the new request ID and estimated approval date

stories.title: Manager can approve or reject a leave request
stories.description: Show a list of pending requests from the manager's team. Each row shows employee name, dates, reason, and Approve/Reject buttons. On approval, notify the employee by email. On rejection, require a short reason.
acceptance_criteria: Manager sees all pending requests from their direct reports
Approve action changes status to 'Approved' and sends email notification
Reject action requires a reason (min 10 chars) before submission

risk.description: Rejection without reason creates ambiguity for the employee and HR audit trail.
risk.mitigation: Enforce minimum-length reason field; store rejection reason in request record.

stories.title: Employee can view their leave balance
stories.description: Show the current leave balance broken down by type: annual, sick, personal. Show days remaining and days taken this year. Update in real time after a new request is approved.
acceptance_criteria: Balance shows annual, sick, and personal days remaining and used
Balance updates within 5 seconds of a leave request being approved

performance.budget_note: Balance endpoint hits HR core — keep latency under 300ms p95 to avoid visible lag on mobile
